overall.description: A continuous drive along a desert highway approaching a futuristic industrial city (Night City from Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily forward past sparse desert vegetation and occasional vehicles, with a distinctive yellow dome structure and towering skyscrapers visible in the distance. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with a bright, sun-bleached desert aesthetic.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert highway stretching toward a distant futuristic city skyline. The NC Tower and industrial complex dominate the horizon while desert scrub and saguaro cacti line the roadside. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the right as the camera maintains a steady driving pace.

segments.scene_description: The drive continues along the desert highway with the yellow dome structure growing larger on the right side. The city skyline appears closer as the camera advances, and a highway guardrail becomes visible. Traffic remains light with occasional vehicles passing on the right.

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera passing the yellow dome structure, which exits the frame behind. The industrial complex looms much closer now, and industrial silos appear on the left horizon. The highway guardrail runs alongside the right shoulder as multiple vehicles pass by, and the desert scrub vegetation appears to move further left as the camera advances toward the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive along a sun-bleached desert highway that gradually closes the distance toward a towering futuristic industrial skyline. It begins with a wide view of the horizon where the NC Tower and an industrial complex dominate the distance, while saguaro cacti and desert scrub line the roadside. As the camera advances at a steady pace, a prominent yellow dome structure grows larger on the right and a highway guardrail emerges along the shoulder. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the yellow dome, causing it to exit the frame while industrial silos appear on the left horizon. Finally, the industrial complex looms much closer and the desert vegetation recedes to the left as multiple vehicles pass by on the way toward the city.
